name: Wallester
description: Card issuing platform with white-label APIs for physical and virtual cards across Europe.

seo.title: Wallester — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Wallester: Card issuing platform with white-label APIs for physical and virtual cards across Europe.

when_to_use: White-label virtual and physical card issuing for European fintechs
Corporate expense card programs via Wallester API
Prepaid card issuance for European B2B and consumer programs

pros: Free starter tier for card issuing
cons: Scale limits become clear past free tier
review.verdict: Rare free-tier card issuing in Europe — great for prototyping, scrutinize paid tiers before heavy volume.
review.best_for: European fintechs and SaaS needing cost-effective card issuing at small to mid scale
review.not_for: Companies needing acquiring, processing, or non-EU card programs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
